title: Trimming Shop 50g Thick Natural Raffia Ribbon Twine – Nature-Friendly Raffia Straw for Gift Wrapping, Basket Weaving, Florist Bouquets, Craft Projects, Garden Ties & Rustic Packaging Accessory
features: 𝐍𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐚𝐥 𝐑𝐚𝐟𝐟𝐢𝐚 𝐑𝐢𝐛𝐛𝐨𝐧 𝐓𝐰𝐢𝐧𝐞 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐑𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐜 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐦: Enhance your creative projects with this 50g natural raffia ribbon twine from Trimming Shop. Made from plant-based raffia straw, it offers a soft yet sturdy texture ideal for wrapping, tying, and weaving. Each vacuum-packed bundle retains its freshness while saving on storage space.

𝐕𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐥𝐞 𝐑𝐚𝐟𝐟𝐢𝐚 𝐒𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐰 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐀𝐥𝐥 𝐎𝐜𝐜𝐚𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬: Perfect for seasonal celebrations like Christmas, Easter, Halloween, and Valentine’s Day, this natural raffia ribbon is easy to shape and cut. Use it for gift wrapping, bouquet accents, wreath-making, garlands, or basket weaving to give your crafts a handmade, artisanal appeal.

𝐒𝐭𝐫𝐨𝐧𝐠 𝐘𝐞𝐭 𝐆𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐥𝐞 𝐑𝐚𝐟𝐟𝐢𝐚 𝐘𝐚𝐫𝐧: Crafted for strength and flexibility, this raffia string is tough enough for tying and soft enough for decorating fragile items. It's perfect for garden ties, mason jar accents, plant arrangements, and natural-style gift wrapping. Add a tropical, farmhouse, or vintage touch with ease.

𝐈𝐝𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐈𝐧𝐝𝐨𝐨𝐫 & 𝐎𝐮𝐭𝐝𝐨𝐨𝐫 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐣𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐬: Whether you're crafting wedding favours, decorating a rustic party, or weaving garden accessories, this natural raffia adds texture and warmth. It's suitable for DIY wall hangings, woven trays, raffia hats, and table settings—bringing a warm, handmade vibe to every space.

𝐖𝐡𝐚𝐭’𝐬 𝐈𝐧𝐜𝐥𝐮𝐝𝐞𝐝 𝐢𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐏𝐚𝐜𝐤: Each pack includes 50g of thick raffia ribbon twine with lengths varying between 60 to 100cm per strand. Supplied in generous quantities, it’s ideal for artists, crafters, florists, and hobbyists looking for a reliable, plant-derived material to use in everyday and seasonal décor projects.
description: Product Description Is this natural raffia ribbon suitable for nature-friendly gift wrapping? Yes, our nature-friendly thick raffia ribbon is perfect for sustainable gift wrapping. Made from natural raffia straw, it adds rustic charm while being nature-friendly and plastic-free. Can I use this raffia string for both indoor and outdoor crafts? This durable raffia yarn is great for indoor DIY projects and outdoor garden ties, party garlands, or rustic event décor. What can I make with these natural raffia ribbons? These raffia ribbons are ideal for weaving baskets, tying bows, wrapping gifts, florist bouquets, wreaths, and more. They're great for Christmas, Easter, Valentine’s, or tropical-themed decorations. How many raffia ribbons are included in one pack? Each value pack contains a vacuum-sealed natural raffia ribbon string, 50g each, with 60-100cm. Perfect for craft lovers, florists, and nature-conscious decorators. Is the raffia string gentle enough for delicate floral work? Yes, the raffia string is strong yet soft—ideal for tying delicate flowers, embellishing bouquets, or securing small plants without causing damage.
